stemHtml: According to OPS regulations, for operations under IFR or under VFR over routes not navigated by reference to visual landmarks, the minimum navigation equipment is:

options.a: One VOR receiving system and one DME.
options.b: One ADF system and one DME.
options.c: One VOR receiving system and one ADF system.
options.d: One VOR receiving system, one ADF system and two DME.
